title: Plain Foldable Non Woven Storage Box Open Storage Shelf Baskets with Handles for Laundry, Bathroom, Office, Closet (Random Colour)
features: These Foldable Storage Boxes offer a quick and easy space saving solution and everyday handy storage.
Each storage box has an opened size of 30cm x 30cm
This features an on-trend colour scheme, as Pink, Grey and White. Any one random colour will get delivered.

They can be used for laundry baskets or storage baskets, and are large enough to store and organize an array of different items in your house, such as clothes, kid toys, blankets, magazines, books, stationery, firewood, and so on.

They work great for any room in your house or office, also fit on the closet shelf, bookshelf, or desk. The modern and simple design will add a stylish touch to baby rooms, changing rooms, bathrooms, and bedrooms.
